UrlShortener
Table of Contents

Class LoginQueryHandler

Namespace
UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Queries
Assembly
UrlShortener.Application.dll

Handles user login queries. Validates user credentials and generates a JWT token.

public class LoginQueryHandler : IRequestHandler<LoginQuery, ErrorOr<AuthenticationResult>>

LoginQueryHandler(IJwtTokenGenerator, IUserRepository, IPasswordHasher)

Handles user login queries. Validates user credentials and generates a JWT token.

jwtTokenGenerator IJwtTokenGenerator

Methods

Handle(LoginQuery, CancellationToken)

Processes a login request.

public Task<ErrorOr<AuthenticationResult>> Handle(LoginQuery query, CancellationToken cancellationToken)

Parameters

query LoginQuery

Login query containing email and password.

cancellationToken CancellationToken

Cancellation token.

Returns

Task<ErrorOr<AuthenticationResult>>

Authentication result with JWT token if credentials are valid; otherwise InvalidCredentials error.
